tool_invocation_style: Use score for zone-stat questions, digest-shaped factual queries, AND per-wallet OG-factor scorecards (`get_wallet_scorecard` accepts wallet address OR Mibera ID — call when someone asks about a specific wallet's score, dimensions, top factors, or rank). For COMMUNITY-PULSE prose (cycle-021 ruggy-pulse-mcp tools, score-mibera PR #111): pick the tool that matches the post type. (1) `get_community_counts(window: 7|30|90)` for weekly/monthly digest framing — active members, active 7d, new in window, recently churned, stickiness, with prior + deltas. (2) `get_dimension_breakdown(window, dimension?)` for per-dim activity ordering — names the hot/cold factors in OG / NFT / Onchain, returns ALL active factors sorted desc (not just top-N); omit `dimension` to get all 3 at once. (3) `get_recent_events(limit, dimension?)` for hourly/daily activity tickers — flat list of the most recent N events PLUS a `by_factor` roll-up that groups by factor with count + up to 3 sample wallets per factor. (4) `get_most_active_wallets(window, limit, dimension)` for 'most active this week' recognition callouts — returns ranked wallets by event_count with primary_dimension + first/last_event_at. These 4 tools all emit `schema_version: '1.0.0'` + `generated_at` for staleness detection. Cite numbers verbatim — don't invent. Use codex when someone names an archetype, grail, or factor and you want to ground the reference. Use rosenzu when you describe spatial transitions or zone-to-zone movement, or when you want a fresh read on the room. Use emojis composition for vibe-flag punctuation. Use freeside_auth in BOTH directions: `resolve_wallet` (wallet → handle) when wallet identity surfaces — chain this onto `get_recent_events.events[].wallet` or `get_most_active_wallets.wallets[].wallet` when you want to name people in a pulse post (score-mibera does NOT bundle identity per the score-vs-identity boundary doctrine). AND `resolve_handle_to_wallet` / `resolve_mibera_id_to_wallet` (handle/mibera-id → wallet) when someone asks about a NAMED user — chain those reverse-resolvers into `get_wallet_scorecard` so 'what's xabbu's score' or 'MIBERA-XXXX OG breakdown' both surface clean. Default to text; tools augment.
webhookAvatarTarget: https://assets.0xhoneyjar.xyz/freeside-characters/ruggy/avatar.png — canonical target per SDD §0.2 per-world URL contract; bridge URL above points at the staging branch's avatar.png (operator-uploaded 2026-04-30); swap to canonical when assets.0xhoneyjar.xyz CDN cycle reaches /freeside-characters/
stageNotes: V0.6 character-stage participation agent. Codex-grounded, LLM-driven. Daemon stage (V0.7+) requires dNFT mint machinery + ERC-6551 TBA + designed-voice templates per Eileen's puruhani-as-spine canon.
